We care about transparency, which includes how people interact with our
website. These Site Terms explain what’s allowed (and what’s not) when
visiting QAComet.com.

Welcome to QAComet.com. These Website Terms of Use ("Site Terms") govern
your use of this website (the "Site"). By accessing or using the Site,
you agree to comply with these Site Terms. If you do not agree, please
do not use the Site.

All content on this Site, including text,
graphics, logos, and design elements, is the property of QAComet
LLC, a Colorado limited liability company, or its licensors and is
protected by copyright, trademark, and other applicable laws. You
may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works
from any part of the Site without express written permission.

Any third-party trademarks, client names, or testimonials
displayed on this Site are the property of their respective
owners and used with permission.

Use of this Site does not establish a client relationship or
imply a commitment by QAComet to provide services unless
expressly agreed in writing.

Use the Site in any way that could impair its performance,
availability, or security;

Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any systems or networks
connected to the Site;
Reverse engineer or decompile any portion of the Site;

Use the Site to transmit harmful, unlawful, or misleading
content;

Use automated tools (bots, scrapers, etc.) to access or extract
data from the Site without prior consent.

This Site is provided on an “as-is” and
“as-available” basis. QAComet makes no warranties, express or
implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or availability of
the Site or any content provided herein. Your use of the Site is at
your own risk. Browsing this Site does not create a professional or
contractual relationship between you and QAComet. Any services
require a separate written agreement.

To the fullest extent permitted by law,
QAComet shall not be liable for any damages arising out of or
related to your use or inability to use the Site, including but not
limited to indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

This Site may contain links to third-party
websites. QAComet is not responsible for the content, availability,
or practices of those sites, and inclusion of a link does not imply
endorsement.

QAComet may update these Site Terms at any time
without notice. Your continued use of the Site after changes are
posted constitutes your acceptance of those changes.

These Site Terms are governed by the laws of the
State of Colorado, without regard to its conflict of laws
principles.

If you have any questions about these Site Terms,
please contact:

If you choose to share comments,
suggestions, or ideas about the Site with QAComet, you grant us a
perpetual, royalty-free, worldwide license to use that feedback for
any purpose without restriction or compensation.**  **
